variants.title: A413G15
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec A413G15. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the A413G15 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 15µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 17µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 95.0 mm, Length: 241.5 mm, Thread: 1 3/8"-12 UNF 2B, Δ Collapse Pressure: 34 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 15µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Collapse Pressure: 34.5 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: A413G15
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter WH 980/3 Hydraulic Transmission Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A413G15
variants.description: MANN-FILTER transmission oil filters ensure the purest oil and thus protect delicate transmissions against wear caused by impurities. The practical kit also includes the appropriate seal for the transmission oil pan, which should always be replaced during service.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Transmission Filter, Dimension A: 94.0 mm, Dimension B: 62.0 mm, Dimension C: 71.0 mm, Dimension G: 1 3/8-12 UNF, Dimension H: 240.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 15µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 17µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 95.0 mm, Length: 241.5 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Thread: 1 3/8"-12 UNF 2B, Collapse Pressure: 34.5 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: A413G15
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 66378 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec A413G15
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 66378 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 97.5 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 95.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 70.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"3/8-12UNF, Height 1 (H1): 242.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 240.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 15µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 17µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 95.0 mm, Length: 241.5 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Thread: 1 3/8"-12 UNF 2B, Collapse Pressure: 34.5 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C
